Crime Activity & Housing Locations

911 dispatch records · Jan 2020 – May 2026
Bluffdale · Lehi · American Fork · Saratoga Springs
Over five years, Bluffdale crime calls fell 4.8% — the only one of the four cities where crime declined, even as the region grew.

Map View

Clusters show the number of incidents in an area and break apart as you zoom in — click any point for details. Heat map shows overall density.

Apartment Communities

Apartments appear as house pins; crime appears as round dots and clusters.
Data & Sources

Crime & dispatch data

  • Central Utah 911 dispatch records, Jan 2020 – May 2026
  • Obtained under Utah GRAMA, retention series 27585 — certified true copy, June 1, 2026
  • 692,841 dispatch calls processed; filtered to criminal-nature incidents
  • This map plots 43,722 located criminal incidents grouped by type and year

How "crime" is defined

  • Includes theft, burglary, assault, fraud, drug, vandalism, threats, domestic, sex offenses and similar
  • Excludes traffic stops, medical/fire assists, alarms, welfare checks, informational calls
  • Reports filed at police stations or jails are excluded so facilities don't appear as hotspots

Geocoding

  • Addresses → coordinates via U.S. Census Bureau geocoder (government source)

Apartment communities

  • 36 communities compiled & verified via Apartments.com and Google Maps, June 2026
  • Class A–D reflects market tier (A = newest/highest-end), from age, amenities & ratings
Class ratings are preliminary pending review. Dispatch calls reflect reported activity, not convictions. The map shows correlation, not causation.
Prepared for review by the City of Bluffdale · Data through May 31, 2026
Depicts reported dispatch activity and location patterns.
